_description: External context that shapes the stay: weather, occupancy, season, local events. Applied per-stage in the narrative engine.

sunny_calm.label: Sunny, calm, ideal
sunny_calm.narrative_hint: Clear blue sky, calm sea, 26-30°C, gentle breeze. Guests can use the full outdoor program.

sunny_heatwave.label: Sunny but extremely hot (>35°C)
sunny_heatwave.narrative_hint: Heatwave. 37-40°C. AC pushed to limit. Pool crowded, beach unusable between 11-17h. Water consumption high.

overcast.label: Overcast, mild, no rain
overcast.narrative_hint: Grey skies, 20-22°C. Pool heated; beach walkable but not sunbathing weather.

rainy_light.label: Light rain intermittent
rainy_light.narrative_hint: Intermittent rain forces indoor activities. Lobby and restaurants crowded. Kids club overflowing. Guests visibly frustrated.

rainy_storm.label: Heavy storm / thunderstorm
rainy_storm.narrative_hint: Thunderstorm, high winds. Pool closed, beach closed, terrace dining moved inside. Half the property tries to use the spa at once.

windy.label: Very windy
windy.narrative_hint: Strong winds. Beach umbrellas constantly blowing. Pool chairs need weighting. Terrace dining uncomfortable.

cold_snap.label: Unexpectedly cold (<15°C)
cold_snap.narrative_hint: Cold front. Pool empty. Guests layered in sweaters. Spa heavily booked. Staff apologetic.

high.label: High season (peak summer)
high.narrative_hint: Property near capacity. Pool chairs scarce by 10 AM. Restaurants fully booked. Staff visibly stretched. Kids club at limit.

mid.label: Mid / shoulder season
mid.narrative_hint: Comfortable occupancy. Pool available. Restaurants need reservation but not urgent. Staff attentive.

low.label: Low season
low.narrative_hint: Low occupancy. Pool/beach nearly empty. Some F&B outlets closed. Staff relaxed but experience feels off-season.

holiday_surge.label: Holiday surge (Easter, Christmas, NYE)
holiday_surge.narrative_hint: Near-sold-out with families and groups. Festive programming. Queues everywhere. Pricing at peak. Expectations elevated.

music_festival_nearby.label: Music festival nearby (10-30 km)
music_festival_nearby.narrative_hint: Festival crowds passing through property. Nightclub pulses audible on windy nights. Some younger guests excited.

wedding_on_property.label: Wedding taking place on the property
wedding_on_property.narrative_hint: Private wedding in main restaurant evening X. Section cordoned off. Some guest confusion and service stretched.

property_renovation_partial.label: Partial renovation during stay
property_renovation_partial.narrative_hint: One wing or amenity under renovation. Construction noise 9-17h weekdays. Not fully disclosed at booking.

regional_holiday.label: Local regional holiday
regional_holiday.narrative_hint: Regional festivity visible in the town. Staff in traditional dress one night. Dining options limited offsite.

heatwave_regional.label: Regional heatwave advisory
heatwave_regional.narrative_hint: News coverage of heatwave. Pool extremely crowded. AC units maxed out.

influencer_stay_concurrent.label: Known influencer staying concurrently
influencer_stay_concurrent.narrative_hint: Mid-tier influencer doing a stay. Staff slightly preoccupied with their requests. Photo shoots at pool at golden hour.

regional_transport_strike.label: Airport / rail strike in region
regional_transport_strike.narrative_hint: Strike disrupts arrivals/departures. Some guests arrive stressed or late. Hotel improvises extended late check-in.
